title: MT1 Results: Convergence Rate Direction Test — Memory-Time Crystal Framework (MTC-OP-001 v1.2.4)
author: Esposito, Giovanni
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This record contains the pre-registered analysis protocol for MT1, a mandatory trace test of the Memory-Time Crystal framework. MT1 tests the prediction that, among URA-certified astrophysical light-curve systems with η ≥ 4, systems with higher η converge faster to a stable geometric fixed point, with convergence rate scaling as η². The protocol freezes the study systems, inclusion/exclusion rules, AIS → RQA DET cascade structure, windowing procedure, convergence metric, surrogate testing protocol, statistical tests, confound controls, decision rules, amendment procedure, and reporting commitments before analysis of the relevant Kepler/K2 light-curve data. The document also records a data-access embargo: Kepler and K2 public light-curve data for systems R01 and R02 must not be accessed for analysis until after the Zenodo timestamp of this pre-registration.

keywords: pre-registration analysis protocol Memory-Time Crystal MTC Universal Reconfiguration Attractor URA astrophysical light curves Kepler K2 TESS MAST Active Information Storage recurrence quantification analysis RQA determinism surrogate testing PWIAAFT Kendall tau contact Hamiltonian open science falsifiability
